name: Netveil
short_description: A pixel art psychological horror game with a point-and-click system that takes the style of an interactive desktop environment.
detailed_description:
Netveil is a short, pixel art themed point and click adventure that takes the style of an interactive desktop environment. You play as flower_veil, a 14 year old dealing with an eating disorder that meets a strange guy on the chatting platform NetTalk.

Contains:

  • A Pixel Art Themed Interactive Desktop Environment

  • Visual Novel Elements

  • 2 Separate Endings

                                                                                              

  • Veil Is an introvert that usually spends her time talking to people on NetTalk to distract herself from reality. Until recently she only had Liv to talk to, but after joining multiple groups she found an individual named Sebastian who promised something that she could not refuse.

                                                       

  •  Liv is Veil's best friend. They've been friends for a while but Veil has been acting strange lately and in an attempt to help her, Liv recommended writing her thoughts in a journal of some sort.

                                                       

                                                    ERROR: File has not been found.
